title: thunderbird scarica le email su un pc ma non su un altro che ha le stesse impostazioni
creator: arch.lauria
content: ho thunderbid su due pc, ma su uno scarica la posta dal mio account e sull'altro, da quattro giorni, niente; finora ha funzionato tutto bene, da anni. L'account è configurato con POP3 su entrambi, entrambi hanno le stesse impostazioni, ed è spuntata l'opzione di lasciare le email sul server. Sul secondo PC chiedo di scaricare le email dall'account, ma non viene lanciato nessun messaggio di errore; negli ultimi 4 giorni, come detto, non ha scaricato email, mentre sul primo, solo oggi ne ha scaricate più di venti. Quale potrebbe essere il problema?

title: Thunderbird suddenly can't connect with my email server to send outgoing messages.
creator: mdouglas3
content: I have used Thunderbird as my mail client for many years on both my Windows workstation and my Windows laptop. My ISP is Spectrum. All of a sudden, today, Thunderbird has stopped sending outgoing emails from my workstation. I get a message telling me that Thunderbird can't connect with the server. Outgoing email seems to work fine on the laptop, as well as on Spectrum's own Webmail interface. I think I'm getting all my incoming messages, although it's hard to know that for sure. Both machines are running Windows 11. I haven't changed any configurations. What can I do to get Thunderbird to function correctly on my workstation? Thank you.

title: I need to change the password Mozilla uses to access my Earthlink account.
creator: gwrex
content: I received an email message from earthlink which included a verification code that I did not request. Earthlink support told me to change my password immediately which I did. Now when I open open Mozilla on me laptop, it requires me to put in the new password. How do I change the password/login that Mozilla uses to access earthlink?

title: Secondary (gmail) Account Works on Android App But Not On Win Desktop App
creator: lwoodworth0203
content: I have Thunderbird on my Win 11 Pro Laptop and on my Samsung Android phone. My primary email account works fine on both devices. My secondary account with the domain name otakorp.org works fine on the Android Thunderbird app, but when I try to set it up on the Windows version it sees that it's a gmail server and sets both incoming and outgoing servers to Oauth2 authentication, but generates an unspecific error (see included image). Any suggestions?

title: Import backup local.sqlite file
creator: robwms1
content: Just moved to a new computer and am having trouble importing my previuos TBird calendar. From my prior computer backup (created with Macrium Reflect) I have tried moving the local.sqlite backup file to the calendar-data folder in my new TBird profile. However none of my prior calendar events have loaded into my new calendar. Is there another process or file/files I should be using? Thanks in advance. Rob W.

title: How can I retrieve archived e-mails from a previous version of Thunderbird after the newest version wiped out my previous identity?
creator: vonfoto
content: The newest version of Thunderbird wiped out the stored files from the previous version by making me create a new identity. I have tried several times to use "import" to retrieve backed up data from the old version, but without success, even after I re-installed an earlier version of Thunderbird. Each time I use the "import" feature I get a message that it failed unexpectedly. I need these old e-mails because they contain receipts for charitable donations that I need because my tax returns are being audited. What can I do?
